textByHashes.6b40e200507c9919ff0627c13ba11f087fe8a49a: What are you doing on my land?
textByHashes.0a058f00bebdb2fdf81d155dd9e60346ac0ebb24: About what now? What do penguins have to do with anything?
textByHashes.89a61fc87e5c66b5ba1e1b33494729e59305d313: What are you shouting about? Don't you come into my house shouting at me.
textByHashes.83130ba0e3dc623ea08117ccc2aad606b3e93faa: Is this some kind of joke? I'm a SHEEP farmer. That means I need to shear sheep. What are these penguins you keep talking about?
textByHashes.90a1c0783b7faf78d60c6ed0586ee1bc02f85fc4: Like I haven't heard that before.
textByHashes.12dee51cb3facbb68fce611d238fa81b0b7e8b4c: Then why are they disguised as sheep?
textByHashes.05d36fce32a131681913eb118b81cc5f532e618f: Look, when these voices in your head start talking to you again, you might want to ignore them.
textByHashes.e2c9726fd60dfbbe945ac613052a91536af036ee: Right, right. I believe you, sure. Maybe on your way out you could ask the sheep to herd themselves for me.
textByHashes.f2d7cc1a350e7e3a00f1e58eb41fd7a2b07842e6: Yes, my land! This is my farm!
textByHashes.45bd899494525eff32e3086a8d5b72a07efdc635: So you're one of them cave goblins, then? I suppose you weren't to know.
textByHashes.d780145ccc5501db22cda90d20434f8df72577e5: Things? There's more than one now?
textByHashes.db073dc74f500c89fe3dd8d9ad493c394b08731e: Oh dear, oh dear, this is terrible. Terrible!
textByHashes.52bdcc9a9f4b283ceaeb22a6991ca1530d9afc95: I've no idea what to do!
textByHashes.765d80e3f4ffbfcdd81d700b9d96f54784004db9: Well, no actually. I'm just a farmer. I've no idea how to deal with fanatics!
textByHashes.8dc439bb7cef09d42e5e589634b5a1d026a80e3d: Normally I'd say yes, but I just don't have enough for a month's supply.
textByHashes.69176e8b5c0c9e3b1aabccc331f8ff3bc7bf9edd: Seth does, Seth Groats. He's another farmer over yonder at the other farm. Over the river and on the way to Varrock, he has loads of chickens.
textByHashes.05674f9c11d069511fa4555acf1c75f5f6ea8996: Have you been to Seth Groats yet? He's over at the other farm on the way to Varrock!
textByHashes.dbe58a0e56185d82e31ceb59ba39b18f419531e1: Oh, that's wonderful...many thanks for your help...just wonderful.
textByHashes.8bbaee938f4f4b30daf4275e0c9cdc4eeea69b6a: What are you doing on my land? You're not the one who keeps leaving all my gates open and letting out all my sheep, are you?
textByHashes.3c570bee12f09dc85ec1e200eb90bd4fecdb5609: You're after a quest, you say? Well I don't have any here.
textByHashes.2e0b841126794596d58039e51d425a6874dfdfbd: You're after a quest, you say? Actually, I could do with a bit of help.
textByHashes.e6474d6c1a0cbce62059b553f0904912582d2679: My sheep are getting mighty woolly. I'd be much obliged if you could shear them. And while you're at it, spin the wool for me too.
textByHashes.4368d9719f53e8ad65baa8a820336ebd8af61566: Yes, that's it. Bring me 20 balls of wool. And I'm sure I could sort out some sort of payment. Of course, there's the small matter of The Thing.
textByHashes.ced02cc8ec906765e60ba055e259b608d2050213: Have you been shearing my sheep without permission!?
textByHashes.4c65c24c76a461d43e9b72ace174f16bfe1561b8: It's rude to shave another person without permission - don't be coming at me with them shears!
textByHashes.d1ca9e8f223b25f88d409294d947bc7c09db7e3e: I guess no real 'arm was done. Hand the balls over and we can put this whole thing behind us.
textByHashes.eeb03726320c1203f1f85a401497335a4bdc264b: Well now, no one has ever seen The Thing. That's why we call it The Thing, 'cos we don't know what it is.
textByHashes.f343b20228e89cc589eca39d3013668aea540886: Some say it's a black hearted shapeshifter, hungering for the souls of hard working decent folk like me. Others say it's just a sheep.
textByHashes.5db2c748e99fb22fc0280ba4bcd712da7e29ebb4: Well I don't have all day to stand around and gossip. Are you going to shear my sheep or what!
textByHashes.f0631e3a6ce8282ff92e6213a5b1caf3b855a1db: Good! Now one more thing, do you actually know how to shear a sheep?
textByHashes.9ac8ab5323d03a0b4886db2135acb353d436067f: Well, first things first, you need a pair of shears. I've got some here you can use.
textByHashes.b2b395e6afceaa17dee59e822927360760de64b7: You just need to go and use them on the sheep out in my field.
textByHashes.b5e4390932ac1c270408dbd61e0e81cb435631f3: Some of the sheep don't like it too much... Persistence is the key.
textByHashes.ecba4bf9f381e51eed0486e5d781202fe70347cb: Once you've collected some wool you can spin it into balls.
textByHashes.b19c13026888059560b21fb42ea7e286fcf6ecd3: Do you know how to spin wool?
textByHashes.8b6c54d8d44e60a1a1711b73d78408d88af98efa: The nearest Spinning Wheel can be found on the first floor of Lumbridge Castle.
textByHashes.5cc838b8b35fe67a8f8d01f00ddd1d0c30efb35a: To get to Lumbridge Castle just follow the road east.
textByHashes.da73220690cefebe5572ec5d4302509baf2d1299: Oh. How are you doing getting those balls of wool?
textByHashes.d456590124ed60dca2247f0fbb94cf28e839fd92: You need to collect 20 more balls of wool.
textByHashes.0ac2ebba87be8a339972654db2a405b6e487b930: Ah well at least you haven't been eaten. You know what you're doing, right?
textByHashes.65ca808b4634aec7e82e316161308fcc30e0ddf0: Well, you're half way there already! You have a set of shears in your inventory. Just use those on a Sheep to shear it.
textByHashes.5667cfaaa5d8f0b092e56aab2318abf5b3c44eb1: Well once you've collected some wool you'll need to spin it into balls.
textByHashes.680f146e18792900dfbbbcc3ac582cf54798a217: You can get to it, then!
textByHashes.e9a97a04ea196587403fe6d649c369177f2b3e83: Well go find a spinning wheel then. You can find one on the first floor of Lumbridge Castle, just walk east on the road outside my house and you'll find Lumbridge.
textByHashes.3b6a0c3fedf2444954bbaea242cc699df6a3af48: I need more before I can pay you.
textByHashes.ed537551ee374df924d61e7b4a41e4754a78a58b: I need more before I can pay you.
textByHashes.da5441251b307b261490cc9d1852ab4b8b82c7bb: Run for the hills! grab as many chickens as you can! We have to ...
textByHashes.861b7710ff55306bd2dbd2c323a03b94a271edeb: ... flee! Oh, woe is me! The shapeshifter is coming! We're all ...
textByHashes.39291a68b13b2b61513d06a05ff2caec249e3ef1: Have you been out in the sun too long?
textByHashes.2e4cfade1f21d8417cc56ec93de364f225948d4c: I guess I'd better pay you then.
textByHashes.4987287a0f3529929571cf9b2d2a4eeb8d504071: What, on my land? Leave my livestock alone you scoundrel!
textByHashes.14a3eb7883adb39be9e15246fea763c6cde28552: How can you be lost? Just follow the road east and south. You'll end up in Lumbridge fairly quickly.
